steps.title: Analyze the equation
steps.content: Factor as a difference of squares: $$x^2-49=(x-7)(x+7)=0.$$ So $x=7$ or $x=-7$.

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: There are two real solutions, $7$ and $-7$. That is the correct answer.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches Exactly two, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C is correct.
